name: property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual reconciliation causes late payment tracking and tenant disputes. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Time-consuming manual reconciliation of rent payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Time-consuming manual reconciliation of rent payments.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual reconciliation causes late payment tracking and tenant disputes. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and reconciliation processes.
